visual_description: A group of people, mostly dressed in dark, formal attire, are seen in a chaotic scuffle on a wide, dimly lit stone staircase. The audio is filled with a tense and dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of urgency and conflict. The camera is shaky, capturing the frantic movement as some individuals push and shove each other. In the foreground, a person with long, reddish-brown hair is at the center of the commotion. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows and obscuring many details. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera cuts to a close-up profile of a young man with short, platinum-blonde hair. He has a serious and determined expression as he looks off-screen. The background is dark and filled with the silhouettes of other people, suggesting he is in the middle of the same chaotic scene. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera pulls back slightly, showing the young man from behind as he moves through the crowd. He is part of a group of people walking towards a brightly lit, arched opening in the wall ahead.
